name: Almond Joy Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package chocolate cake mix with pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the chocolate cake as directed on the package.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine 1 cup of evaporated milk and 1 cup of sugar. Bring to a boil and stir in marshmallows until melted.
3. Add the coconut and pour over the hot cake.
4. In another saucepan, melt together the remaining evaporated milk, butter, and chocolate chips.
5. Stir until melted and add the toasted almond slices.
6. Pour this mixture over the warm cake (better if made the day before serving).
